2606.10956.title: Mind the Gap: Can Frontier LLMs Pass a Standardized Office Proficiency Exam?
2606.10956.paper_summary: The deployment of Large Language Model (LLM) agents for computer automation is accelerating, yet their ability to navigate complex, professional-grade productivity software is largely untested. We argue that Office automation is an ideal environment for benchmarking document-automation capability, as it requires long-horizon planning and reasoning, precise parameter configuration, and multi-application integration. To quantify this capability, we introduce an evaluation based on China's National Computer Rank Examination (NCRE), featuring 200 comprehensive practical-operation tasks across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint. Each task is scored on a 100-point rubric scale using 7,118 machine-gradable criteria, and Score Rate (SR) denotes the mean percentage of rubric points earned across these tasks. We benchmark 7 frontier LLMs and observe stark limitations: single-turn models score a maximum of 36.6%. A stronger agentic system with execution feedback, iterative repair, and broader Office automation access reaches 68.8%, but remains below the 95.5% community-reference score used as a scoring sanity check. Ultimately, our experiments demonstrate that despite recent advancements in code generation, achieving reliable fine-grained Office document automation remains a significant challenge for current code-generating LLM and agent systems.
2606.10956.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理在計算機自動化中的部署正在加速，但它們在複雜的專業級生產力軟件中的導航能力仍未得到充分測試。<lb/>我們認為，辦公自動化是一個理想的環境，用於基準測試文檔自動化能力，因為它需要長期規劃和推理、精確的參數配置以及多應用集成。<lb/>為了量化這一能力，我們引入了一項基於中國國家計算機Rank考試（NCRE）的評估，涵蓋了200個跨越Word、Excel和PowerPoint的綜合實踐操作任務。<lb/>每個任務根據100分的標準量表進行評分，使用7,118個機器可評分的標準，而得分率（SR）表示這些任務中獲得的標準分數的平均百分比。<lb/>我們基準測試了7個前沿的LLM，觀察到明顯的限制：單回合模型的最高得分為36.6%。<lb/>一個更強大的代理系統，具備執行反饋、迭代修復和更廣泛的辦公自動化訪問，達到68.8%，但仍低於95.5%的社區參考得分，該得分用作評分的合理性檢查。<lb/>最終，我們的實驗表明，儘管最近在代碼生成方面取得了進展，但實現可靠的細粒度辦公文檔自動化仍然是當前代碼生成LLM和代理系統面臨的一個重大挑戰。
2606.10956.author: Tengchao Lv et.al.
2606.10956.authors: Tengchao Lv, Dongdong Zhang, Jiayu Ding, Yilin Jia, Yuzhong Zhao, Yupan Huang, Wenshan Wu, Xiangyang Zhou, Shaohan Huang, Nan Yang, Li Dong, Lei Cui, Furu Wei
